member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.CborWriterExtensions.WriteDateTime(System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Writes the DateTime as UnixEpochSeconds which is the only type we support for CBOR.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.CborWriterExtensions.WriteOptimizedNumber(System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter,System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double using the smallest CBOR representation that preserves value and precision.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.CborWriterExtensions.WriteOptimizedNumber(System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter,System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a float using the smallest CBOR representation that preserves value and precision. This method uses manual encoding to avoid writing as a half-precision float.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader
member.summary: A streaming CBOR reader that processes large CBOR data streams in chunks without loading the entire payload into memory at once. This class wraps to provide streaming capabilities while maintaining the same reading interface.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame
member.summary: Represents a single container frame (map or array) within the nesting stack of the .

member.name: P:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of CBOR container (map or array).

member.name: P:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame.RemainingItems
member.summary: Gets the number of items left to be read in this container. For indefinite-length containers, this value is null.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame.#ctor(Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.CborContainerType,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The number of items in the container, or null for indefinite-length containers.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame.ConsumeItem
member.summary: Decrements the count when an item is consumed. For indefinite-length containers, this method does nothing.

member.name: P:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ContainerFrame.IsComplete
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this container has been fully consumed.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.CborContainerType
member.summary: Enum to track the type of CBOR container (map or array) for state management within the CborStreamReader.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class that reads CBOR data from the specified stream.
member.param: The input stream containing CBOR-formatted data. The stream must be readable and remain open for the lifetime of the reader.
member.exception: Thrown when the stream parameter is null.
member.remarks: The reader uses a configurable initial buffer size (from ) and will automatically resize the buffer if needed to handle larger CBOR items.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.RefillBuffer(System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is called when a read operation fails because it needs more data than is currently available in the buffer. It handles stitching leftover data with a new chunk from the stream and, if necessary, resizing the buffer.
member.param: Number of bytes to skip before reading new data (e.g., 1 to skip CBOR break byte 0xFF)

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ExecuteRead``1(System.Func{System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader,``0})
member.summary: Executes a CBOR read operation, refilling the buffer and retrying if a CborContentException is thrown.
member.typeparam: The return type of the CBOR read operation.
member.param: A delegate representing the read operation to execute.
member.returns: The result of the read operation.
member.exception: Thrown if too many retries are attempted or if the stream ends unexpectedly.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ExecuteValueRead``1(System.Func{System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader,``0})
member.summary: Executes the provided CBOR read operation and automatically updates the item count of the current container (if any) to ensure that whenever an item is read, the parent container's RemainingItems count is decremented.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborStreamReader.ExpandBufferSizeForLargeStrings
member.summary:
Preemptively expands the buffer if the upcoming CBOR string declares a length larger than the current buffer capacity.
This reduces multiple incremental refills when reading large definite-length CBOR strings by allocating enough space for the entire value in one step.

member.name: P:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborWriterPool.MaxPoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum size of the writer pool. Minimum value is 1.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborWriterPool.Rent
member.summary: Retrieves a CborWriter from the pool, or creates a new one if the pool is empty.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.CborWriterPool.Return(System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter)
member.summary: Returns a CborWriter to the pool for reuse. If the pool is already full then the writer will be discard.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.EventStreams.CborEventStreamPublisher
member.summary: Base class for cbor event stream publishers.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.EventStreams.CborEventStreamPublisher.CreateCborMarshallerContext(System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter)
member.summary: Construct a CborMarshallerContext that subclasses can use to run the marshaller for the event type that should be sent.
member.param: The writer that the marshaller will use to write as it is marshalling the user's object into it's CBOR representation.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborErrorResponseUnmarshaller
member.summary: Class for unmarshalling CBOR service responses.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborErrorResponseUnmarshaller.Unmarshall(Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborUnmarshallerContext)
member.summary: Build an ErrorResponse from Cbor
member.param: The Cbor parsing context. Usually an Amazon.Runtime.Internal.CborUnmarshallerContext.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborErrorResponseUnmarshaller.SanitizeErrorType(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the error type from a Smithy shape identifier string. The input is expected to be in the format "namespace#ErrorType[:additionalInfo]". Returns the error type portion (e.g., "ErrorType").

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborErrorResponseUnmarshaller.GetInstance
member.summary: Return an instance of CborErrorResponseUnmarshaller.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborBoolUnmarshaller
member.summary: Unmarshaller for bool fields

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborNullableBoolUnmarshaller
member.summary: Unmarshaller for bool fields

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborStringUnmarshaller
member.summary: Unmarshaller for string fields

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborResponseMetadataUnmarshaller
member.summary: Unmarshaller for ResponseMetadata

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborUnmarshallerContext.AddPathSegment(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new segment to the current path stack. Typically used when entering a new object property.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.CborUnmarshallerContext.PopPathSegment
member.summary: Removes the most recent segment from the path stack. Typically used when exiting a property.

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.ICborErrorResponseUnmarshaller`2
member.summary: The interface for unmarshalling a cbor error response.

member.name: M:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.ICborErrorResponseUnmarshaller`2.Unmarshall(`1,Amazon.Runtime.Internal.ErrorResponse)
member.summary: The unmarshall method accepts a context, the error response and returns the modeled exception.
member.returns: T, the error shape that is unmarshalled from the CBOR context

member.name: T:Amazon.Extensions.CborProtocol.Internal.Transform.ICborUnmarshaller`2
member.summary: Interface for unmarshallers which unmarshall objects from response data. The Unmarshallers are stateless, and only encode the rules for what data in the Cbor stream goes into what members of an object.
member.typeparam: The type of object the unmarshaller returns
The type of the Cbor unmashaller context, which contains the state during parsing of the Cbor stream.
